title: Set up project foundation: config, types, and store
description: Create package.json with dependencies (Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, Recharts). Configure tsconfig.json and tailwind.config.ts. Define core TypeScript interfaces (User, Category, Transaction, MonthlyBudgetSummary) in src/lib/types.ts. Implement in-memory store (src/lib/store.ts) with Maps for each entity, seed function, and data isolation helpers. Create seed data in src/lib/seed.ts.
notes: Store must export typed Maps (users, categories, transactions, monthlyBudgetSummary). Seed function creates two demo users with default categories and sample transactions. Ensure all maps are keyed by user_id for isolation.

title: Build authentication library and session management
description: Implement src/lib/auth.ts with password validation (plaintext for MVP) and user lookup. Create src/lib/session.ts with a Map<token, userId> for session storage, plus functions to create/verify/clear sessions. Ensure all functions are typed.
notes: Session tokens are UUID strings (crypto.randomUUID). No JWT or bcrypt per design decision. Plaintext passwords must be clearly commented as MVP-only. Auth functions must validate user existence and password match.

title: Implement auth API routes: register, login, logout
description: Build POST /api/auth/register route: validate input, create user, seed default categories, create session, set HttpOnly cookie. Build POST /api/auth/login route: validate credentials, create session, set cookie. Build POST /api/auth/logout route: clear session and cookie. All routes must return appropriate status codes (201, 200, 401, 400).
notes: Register must call seed function for user's default categories. Cookies must be HttpOnly, secure in production. Logout must delete token from session Map. Return user object without password_hash.

title: Build categories API routes (GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE)
description: Implement GET /api/categories: returns all categories for authenticated user. POST /api/categories: creates a custom category, enforces unique name per user. PATCH /api/categories/[id]: updates name or limit_cents, validates ownership. DELETE /api/categories/[id]: blocks if linked transactions exist, returns 409 with count.
notes: All endpoints must validate session and filter by user_id. DELETE must check transaction count in store before allowing. PATCH must prevent name conflicts.

title: Build categories reassign API and UI form component
description: Implement PATCH /api/categories/[id]/reassign: validates source/target ownership, updates all transactions' category_id, updates MonthlyBudgetSummary rows, then deletes source category. Create CategoryForm component for creating/editing categories with fields for name, type, and limit_cents, plus validation.
notes: Reassign endpoint must update both transactions and monthly summaries synchronously. CategoryForm must handle both create and edit modes, show validation errors, and disable submit when invalid.

title: Build transactions API routes (GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE) and budget utilities
description: Implement GET /api/transactions with optional year_month and category_id filters. POST /api/transactions: validates amount >0, category ownership, computes budget warning (90% threshold) using budgetUtils, updates MonthlyBudgetSummary. PATCH and DELETE routes with ownership checks and summary updates. Create src/lib/budgetUtils.ts for warning logic and spending calculations.
notes: POST must return budget_warning in response if threshold crossed. All transaction mutations must synchronously update MonthlyBudgetSummary Map. Budget utils must compute spent_cents for a category+month and warning percentage.

title: Build budget summary and charts API routes
description: Implement GET /api/budgets/summary: returns spent vs limit per category for given month, using MonthlyBudgetSummary Map. GET /api/charts/pie: returns expense totals by category for month, excludes zero-spend categories. GET /api/charts/bar: returns trailing 6 months of expense totals by category. All routes require authentication and user isolation.
notes: Budget summary must default to current month if year_month omitted. Bar chart must return data for exactly N months in ascending order. Pie chart must only include expense categories with amount_cents > 0.

title: Build root layout, global CSS, and homepage
description: Create src/app/layout.tsx with basic HTML structure, session provider pattern, and NavBar component. Create src/app/globals.css with Tailwind directives and base styles. Build src/app/page.tsx as homepage with login/dashboard redirect logic.
notes: Layout must include a NavBar and handle session state. Homepage should redirect to dashboard if authenticated, else show marketing. Use Tailwind's @apply for custom styles.

title: Build login and registration pages
description: Create src/app/login/page.tsx and src/app/register/page.tsx with forms for email and password. Forms must submit to respective API routes, handle errors (401, 400), and redirect to dashboard on success. Include client-side validation.
notes: Forms must show inline validation errors. On success, redirect using router.push. Handle network errors gracefully.

title: Build dashboard layout, NavBar, and transaction form component
description: Create src/app/dashboard/layout.tsx with dashboard-specific layout. Build NavBar component with navigation links and logout button. Build TransactionForm component with fields for amount, date, category, type, notes, and real-time budget warning display.
notes: TransactionForm must fetch categories for dropdown, compute budget warning on amount/category change, and show inline warning. Form must submit via fetch and trigger re-fetch of dashboard data.

title: Build dashboard page with transaction list and summary
description: Create src/app/dashboard/page.tsx as a client component that fetches transactions and budget summary. Display recent transactions list with delete buttons. Include 'Add Transaction' button that opens TransactionForm. After mutations, re-fetch data without full page reload.
notes: Dashboard must use useState/useEffect for data fetching. Implement delete transaction with confirmation. Ensure budget summary updates after transaction mutations.

title: Build budget progress page with MonthPicker and progress bars
description: Create src/app/budget/page.tsx to display budget summary for selected month. Build MonthPicker component for month selection. Build BudgetProgressBar component to visualize spent vs limit with color coding for over-limit states.
notes: Budget page must fetch summary data when month changes. Progress bar must cap at 100% visually but show over-limit with distinct color. Include 'No limit set' for categories without limit_cents.

title: Build charts page with interactive Recharts components
description: Create src/app/charts/page.tsx with MonthPicker for pie chart and trailing months selector for bar chart. Build PieChart component with Recharts, enabling drill-down on slice click. Build BarChart component with Recharts for stacked/grouped monthly totals.
notes: Pie chart must exclude zero-spend categories. Bar chart must show 6 months by default. Clicking a pie slice should filter transaction list (drill-down). Ensure charts re-render on month change without full reload.

title: Build categories management page
description: Create src/app/categories/page.tsx to list user's categories with edit/delete buttons. Integrate CategoryForm for creating and editing categories. Handle delete with reassign flow (show modal if transactions exist).
notes: Page must fetch categories. Delete button must check transaction count and show reassign modal if needed. Edit button should open CategoryForm in edit mode.

title: Integration, error handling, and final polish
description: Ensure all pages and API routes are wired correctly. Add loading states, error boundaries, and proper redirects for unauthorized access. Test critical user flows: register, login, add transaction, view budget, view charts, manage categories.
notes: Test data isolation: ensure User A cannot access User B's data via API. Verify budget warning triggers at 90%. Check that MonthlyBudgetSummary updates correctly on all transaction mutations. Ensure charts are responsive.
